Case: Verify user can log in with valid credentials
Author: [Author Name]
Execution Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
  2. Enter a valid username and password.
  3. Click the Login button.
Expected Result:
• User is redirected to the home dashboard.
  • User's name is displayed in the top-right corner.
  • Session cookie is set.
Precondition: User account exists and is active. Browser cookies are enabled.

Case: Verify error message on login with incorrect password
Author: [Author Name]
Execution Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
  2. Enter a valid username and an incorrect password.
  3. Click the Login button.
Expected Result:
• User remains on the login page.
  • Error message displayed: "Invalid username or password."
  • Password field is cleared.
  • No session cookie is created.

Case: Verify required field validation on form submission
Author: [Author Name]
Execution Steps:
1. Navigate to the data entry form.
  2. Leave all required fields blank.
  3. Click the Submit button.
Expected Result:
• Form is not submitted.
  • Each required field is highlighted with a red border.
  • Inline error message "This field is required." appears below each empty required field.
  • Page does not scroll or navigate away.
Precondition: User is logged in and has access to the form.
